_meta.title: The Impunity Machine — Case Register
_meta.description: Individual case tracking for Bangladesh rape justice accountability. Each case is tracked from incident to final outcome. Status updated automatically when new leads match a case.

status_legend.REPORTED: Complaint filed — no further confirmed action
status_legend.COUNTER_CHARGED: Survivor charged under Section 17 or similar
status_legend.CLOSED_UNPROVEN: Case closed as unproven by police

cases.label: Magura Child Rape & Murder
cases.accused_description: Male adult. Name suppressed — victim is minor.

timeline.event: Accused confessed. High Court directive issued to complete within 180 days.
Death sentence delivered. 71 days from assault.

cases.notes: The Magura Exception — documented in §02 of BD-INV-002. System capable of 71-day resolution when public outrage makes delay politically impossible. 148,313 other cases in queue: no outrage, no urgency.

cases.label: Runa Akhter — Section 17 Inversion
cases.victim_description: Adult woman. Named: Runa Akhter (name in public record — she was the convicted party).
cases.accused_description: Male adult. Case later proved false. Accused acquitted.
cases.sentence: Runa Akhter sentenced to 5 years imprisonment + Tk 20,000 fine under Section 17

timeline.event: Runa Akhter files rape complaint, Cox's Bazar. Accused arrested and jailed.
Case proceeds. Eventually proved false. Accused acquitted.
Accused files Section 17 counter-complaint (approximate — less than 6 weeks before arrest).
timeline.source: Prothom Alo — exact date not confirmed

timeline.event: Runa Akhter arrested from her home on court order.
Runa Akhter sentenced: 5 years imprisonment + Tk 20,000 fine. 56 days from arrest to conviction.

cases.notes: The Runa Akhter Inversion — documented in §02 and §03 of BD-INV-002. Section 17 proceeding: 7 weeks. Average WCRPA trial for genuine survivor: 2,349 days. The machine runs fastest when it runs against the woman who tried to use it.

cases.label: Barishal — Section 17 Counter-Prosecution
cases.sentence: Original complainant arrested. Five charged including three teachers.

timeline.event: Original rape complaint filed. Attempted-rape allegation.
Court rules case false. Orders arrest of original plaintiff. Five people charged including original complainant and three teachers.

cases.notes: Second documented Section 17 case. Part of §03 analysis. No national aggregate data on Section 17 prosecutions exists — CONFIRMED ABSENT. This case and CX-2023-001 are the two confirmed cases tracked by this investigation.
